title: epidendrum oxyglossum
intro: Epidendrum oxyglossum, also known as the tongue orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of flowering plant known for its unique, long, thin, and tongue-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Epidendrum oxyglossum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming Epidendrum oxyglossum are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and improved digestion, with herbal preparations often involving the plant being made into teas, infusions, or tinctures.
